title: A Quantized Native Runtime for On-Device Semantic Audio Generation
innovation_summary: A Quantized Native Runtime for On-Device Semantic Audio Generation: We present aria, a dependency-free native runtime that runs the complete text-to-music pipeline of Stable Audio~3 (SA3) on ordinary GPUs, CPU-only machines, and a Raspberry~Pi~5, with.
